rationale: Educ. Code §7.065 governs a biennial teaching and learning conditions survey administered by the commissioner. It has no connection to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The commissioner shall develop an online survey to be administered statewide at least biennially to superintendents, principals, supervisors, classroom teachers, counselors, and other appropriate full-time professional employees who are required to hold a certificate issued under Subchapter B, Chapter 21.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this survey statute.
